sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_logical (value1 UInt8, value2 UInt8, value3 UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_logical SET value1 = 1 WHERE and(value2 = 1, value3 = 1);
SELECT and(value1, value2, value3) FROM test_logical;
SELECT and(value1, value2, value3) AS logical_result FROM test_logical WHERE value1 = 1;
